author: Atris Labs
name: 10L MLP3x Int5/Int6 + BigramHash + SmearGate + SWA
blurb: 25.5M param model with Int5 MLP + Int6 attention quantization, BigramHash(10240), SmearGate, SWA(23 checkpoints), WD=0.04, grad_clip=0.3, 3% magnitude pruning. Trained at seq_len=2048, batch=786K on 8xH100 via Modal.
